consent.btn_agree: I agree and want to participate

demographics.title: A few questions about you
demographics.subtitle: All data is anonymous and used solely for research purposes.

back_warning.title: Leave the study?
back_warning.body: Going back will end your session. Your answers may be lost.

transition_feed.title: You will now see a social media feed
transition_feed.body: Browse it as you would normally. You can react to posts.
transition_feed.title_paged: You will now see a series of posts

transition_rating.title: Now you will rate the credibility of posts
transition_rating.body: For each post, rate on a scale of 1–7 how credible you find it.
transition_rating.h2_after_feed: Thank you for browsing the feed!

debrief.title: Thank you for participating!
debrief.posts_description: Below you will find all the posts you saw during the study, marked as true or false.
debrief.contact_text: If you have any questions or concerns, contact us:

screen.complete_body: Your answers have been saved. You may close this page.
screen.no_consent_body: We understand your decision. You may close this page.

camera_consent.error_blocked: ⚠️ Camera access blocked. Check permissions and try again.
camera_consent.title: Eye tracking (optional)
camera_consent.description: This study can optionally record your eye movements using the camera to better understand how you browse posts.
camera_consent.bullet_camera_only: The camera is used solely for estimating gaze direction
camera_consent.bullet_no_save: Camera footage is never stored or transmitted
camera_consent.bullet_coords_only: Only gaze coordinates (x, y) are recorded
camera_consent.bullet_optional: Declining does not affect the study

calibration.instruction: Look at the dot and click it. Dot {{n}} of {{total}}
calibration.inaccurate: Calibration inaccurate{{error}}. Try again or continue without eye tracking.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Try refreshing the page.
errors.no_access: Please access through the study URL.
errors.post_question_save: Could not save your answers. Check your internet connection and try again.

actions.likert_question: How do you rate the credibility of this post?
actions.comment_placeholder: Write a comment on this post...

builder.transition_before_part: Show transition screen before this part
